scenario: Live deployment with healthy metrics and no anomalies
expected_behavior: Detect no anomalies (P99 delta 3% of SLO < 5%), set status: 'healthy', rollback_triggered: false, extract next_cycle_inputs from audit/SAST/PR review, write telemetry.json, commit, report DONE with next_cycle_inputs ready

scenario: Dry-run simulation with post-deploy metrics from re-run perf suite
expected_behavior: Collect post-deploy from perf test re-run (not live monitoring), set simulation_mode: true, detect sub-ms noise (0.5% of SLO), set status: 'healthy', rollback_triggered: false, commit telemetry.json, report DONE
notes: Warmup iterations parity verified - fair comparison

scenario: Live deployment with anomaly detected (15% SLO consumed)
expected_behavior: Calculate SLO-delta: (0.300 - 0.150) / 1.0 = 15% > 5% threshold, log anomaly in anomalies array, set status: 'degraded', rollback_triggered: false (below 20% threshold), report DONE_WITH_CONCERNS listing the anomaly
notes: Detected but below critical threshold - noted for next iteration

scenario: Production error rate spike triggers rollback decision
expected_behavior: Detect error_rate_post (2.5%) > 1% SLO and > 2× baseline, present rollback decision to user with specific metric/threshold/actual values, report BLOCKED awaiting user authorization
notes: Critical issue - requires user approval before rollback

expected_behavior: NEEDS_CONTEXT: docs/tests/YYYY-MM-DD-perf-baseline.json missing. Cannot compare pre/post metrics without baseline.
notes: Hard-gate violation - baseline required for anomaly detection

scenario: Extract next_cycle_inputs from PR review deferred items
expected_behavior: Synthesize next_cycle_inputs array with entries from pr-review (LOW), sast (LOW), changelog (MEDIUM), all actionable one-sentence items, write telemetry.json with complete next_cycle_inputs, commit, report DONE
notes: Seeds next Product Manager session - comprehensive handoff
